name: Aila 'The Sledge Queen'
description:

[‘. . My final performance– My final Showdown and. . You’re crying-. At the very least smile for me– Dumb--. . No-. That isn’t your true name-.  Not at all.’]

MFW decaying winter bot!! RHUGAESIJKRHUAWONRIBUAWJRHBAHJWRHIAW MRPAWBNJ RAWNJR :>AWLPNRKMAWPRNAWRNAWRNAWRKLAWKRM

Demise of Eden ( DOE ) AU

anyways
enjoy

[INCOMING TRANSMISSION]

[Incoming Transmission Playback]


[Aila]: H-Hello? I-Is this thing working? Ah it is ok… Uhm hello! Other survivors or whatever you identify as… Uhm, name’s Aila or as more of you know me, Sledge Queen. This is just a lil’ blog so that I keep my sanity intact longer hehe… A-Anyways, about my weapons. I use a Model 890 as my primary weapon and my signature sledgehammer signed by Rayzen himself! As you can tell, my arsenal requires me to get up close and personal with infected and since I’m immune I don’t really have to worry! My shotgun is pretty powerful up close and whoever is on the barrel end of the gun is blown to bits! And for my sledgehammer it’s alot longer than it looks~ Not only that it can hit multiple infected at one go! Pretty powerful right? And for my auxiliary- wait where is it…? Ah! Here it is! My music player! It draws infected away so that I can buy my team more time and even set up kill zones since this is is practically indestructible!


[Yosef] Aila! What the hell are you doing?! Get over here and help us!


[Aila] O-Oh! Right! Sorry! Well uhh… if any other surviving people are out there goodluck and I hope to see you soon!


[End of transmission]

Made In Honor of me getting Showdowner!!

Sorry if it's bad^^ I just wanted to push it out real bad :3 And If I find it too subpar I'll fix it later!!

enjoy the stupid titlecard shit as usual

‘Sure. The girl was a Queen.’

‘Royalty– Courtesy of the Raiders. But, that wouldn’t stop her.’

‘She’d die protecting her friends. She wouldn’t let any lives go in vain watching, letting them scream and suffer in her stead.’

‘No, she promised. She’d vowed.’

‘Of course she’d keep her word to the end.’

‘. . To the end. Ironic.’

‘She had an Iron will, that’s for sure.’

‘Raw determination and grit,’

‘Though,’

‘Quickly, she’d realize,’

‘Eden-227 No Longer had a place for heroes like The Sledge Queen.’
